nasb.text: Then the sons of Israel did what was evil in the sight of the Lord; and the Lord gave them into the hands of Midian seven years.

esv.text: The people of Israel did what was evil in the sight of the Lord, and the Lord gave them into the hand of Midian seven years.

cnv.text: 以色列人又行了耶和華看為惡的事；耶和華就把他們交在米甸人手裡七年。

ccb.text: 后来，以色列人又做耶和华视为恶的事，耶和华就把他们交在米甸人手中，受他们统治七年。
